key.name: todos
key.description: An array of todo item strings stored as plain text

key.name: completed
key.description: An array of completed todo item strings

key.name: show-completed
key.description: Whether to show completed items in the panel menu

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where to place the indicator: left, center, right

key.name: pinned
key.description: An array of pinned todo item strings

key.name: drag-modifier
key.description: Modifier key used with Up/Down arrows to move items (alt, ctrl, shift)

key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Global shortcut to open or close the Snap Todo panel menu

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Whether to show the extension indicator in the top panel

key.name: use-drawer
key.description: If true, opens a full-height drawer from the right edge instead of a standard menu.
